name: Ispire Technology Inc.
business: The company is engaged in the research and development, design, commercialization, sales, marketing and distribution of branded and non-branded vaping hardware products in both nicotine and cannabis spaces. Nicotine products are marketed under the Aspire brand globally through distributors, and cannabis products under the Ispire brand primarily on an ODM basis in the United States, Canada, and South Africa.
sellsTo: direct consumers (cannabis heating devices via internet)

exposures.sentence: We are engaged in the research and development, design, commercialization, sales, marketing and distribution of branded and non-branded vaping hardware products in both the nicotine and cannabis spaces.
The business of the Joint Venture is developing, licensing, owning, and operating an industry-standard age-verification solution for vapor (e-cigarette) devices.
On February 5, 2024, we commenced manufacturing on two of the six lines in our approximately 31,000 square foot manufacturing facility in Malaysia.
IKE has also added an agentic AI suite of services to its SaaS platform, which we believe will further enhance the value proposition to consumers, regulators and tobacco companies.

Existing laws, regulations and policies and the issuance of new or more stringent laws, regulations, policies and any other restrictions or limitations in relation to the nicotine vaping industry have and can materially and adversely affect our business operations.
U.S. tariff rate on all goods imported from China is 30% and the tariff rate on all goods imported from Malaysia is 19%.

catalysts.event: Expansion of manufacturing capacity in Malaysia by adding up to 70 new lines at a second factory
catalysts.sentence: We plan to continue expanding our production capabilities in Malaysia as a way to diversify our source of supply, including by adding up to 70 new lines at a second factory located nearby our first Malaysian operating facility. This expansion is expected to occur over the next 12 months.

catalysts.event: Submission of PMTAs for a pod-based e-cigarette system with IKE age-gating technology
catalysts.sentence: We are working on the submission of several new premarket tobacco product applications (each a PMTA) for a pod-based e-cigarette system with a variety of flavors, which includes the IKE point-of-use age-gating technology, in the next 6 to 12 months.

catalysts.event: Expected significant revenue increase from OEM/ODM contract in fiscal year 2026
catalysts.sentence: Production for the customer began in fiscal year 2025 and given the ramp up in demand in June, July and August of 2025, we believe that this contract will yield significant revenue increases from the OEM and ODM business in our 2026 fiscal year.
